codeReview.summary: Three fixes are implemented correctly (ESM import replacement, failed count arithmetic, and ralplan mode map updates), but the HUD directory propagation fix is incomplete in runtime wiring, so VAL-LOGIC-003 is not fully satisfied.

issues.description: initializeHUDState is still called without the resolved project directory (`await initializeHUDState();`). The directory is resolved later at line 177 (`const cwd = resolveToWorktreeRoot(...)`), so startup cleanup can still read/write HUD state from process.cwd() instead of the intended project/worktree directory.

Regression tests validate directory forwarding inside cleanup helpers, but do not cover initializeHUDState or its call site in hud/index.ts. This allowed the integration gap above to pass tests while the runtime path remained incorrect.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature metadata requires `bugfix-worker`, but that skill is not available in this environment.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl (workerSessionId f4f76764-0484-4424-a9f0-a250c2a8141a) records `Error: Skill "bugfix-worker" not found`; handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false cites this missing skill.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission-level CI requirements and feature-level verification steps are inconsistent on lint coverage.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md requires `npm run lint` (lines 39-44), but fix-critical-logic-bugs verificationSteps list only vitest/tsc/build in features.json.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Expected shared-state files referenced by worker flow are missing in repo-local `.factory/`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Paths `/home/paul/oh-my-claudecode/.factory/services.yaml` and `/home/paul/oh-my-claudecode/.factory/library/` are absent during review despite being referenced in mission guidance and worker transcript flow.

summary: Review failed due to one blocking correctness gap: HUD startup still invokes initializeHUDState without passing the resolved project directory, so the targeted directory-propagation bug is not fully fixed end-to-end.
